surfaces.label: Onward book core HTML
surfaces.upstream: local staged website snapshot in input/
surfaces.target_surface: whole-book local reading surface plus future canonical chapter and section records
surfaces.notes: Primary authored book body for the website, staged locally rather than pulled from a live repo integration. The current local builder now renders every manifest entry into a whole-book reading surface and emits an omission audit, while broader canonical records and companion media remain future work.

surfaces.label: Chapter audiobook links
surfaces.upstream: repo-owned audiobook manifest and MP3 files under audiobook/
surfaces.notes: The local whole-book builder now maps reviewed MP3 tracks from `audiobook/manifest.json` onto matching chapter and supplement pages, but richer companion metadata and off-site distribution lanes still remain future work.

surfaces.label: Full book audio
surfaces.upstream: repo-owned audiobook manifest and MP3 files under audiobook/
surfaces.notes: The local builder now emits a dedicated `audiobook.html` page, publishes a merged full-audiobook MP3 when built from `audiobook/manifest.json`, and exposes direct browser play/download controls, but the off-site distribution lane is still unresolved.

surfaces.label: Chapter podcast episodes
surfaces.notes: Podcast material connected to individual chapters.

surfaces.label: Full book podcast
surfaces.notes: Long-form podcast coverage for the whole book.

surfaces.label: Scanned companion materials
surfaces.target_surface: archive-sources page, supplement source attachments, and future supplement galleries
surfaces.notes: The local builder now publishes the current root-level archive PDFs/image scan from `input/` onto `archive-sources.html` and reuses that seam for the Rolland Alain memoir source-PDF link, but broader supplement galleries, richer metadata, and additional archive-material shaping still remain future work.
